---
title: "VS Capability Dashboard"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

_candidates = [Path("data/vs-capability-dashboard.json"), Path("../data/vs-capability-dashboard.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/vs-capability-dashboard.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report vs-capability-dashboard"
    )

d             = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group         = d["group"]
value_streams = d["value_streams"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>Delivery status per Value Stream, broken down by PI and ART.</p>
<ul>
  <li><strong>🧩 Capabilities</strong> — cross-ART/VS deliverables that may span multiple ARTs</li>
  <li><strong>🛠️ Direct Features</strong> — Features parented directly to an Epic (no Capability wrapper), owned by a single ART</li>
</ul>
""")
```

```{python}
def _delta_str(delta):
    if delta > 0:
        return f"▲{delta}"
    if delta < 0:
        return f"▼{abs(delta)}"
    return "="

def _art_summary_table(arts, label):
    if not arts:
        return ""
    html = (
        f"<h4>{label}</h4>"
        '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered" style="font-size:0.85em">'
        "<thead><tr>"
        "<th>ART</th><th>Count</th><th>Planned</th><th>Actual</th>"
        "<th>Δ</th><th>% Done</th><th>Status</th>"
        "</tr></thead><tbody>"
    )
    for art in arts:
        art_link = (f'<a href="{art["art_url"]}" target="_blank">{art["art_name"]}</a>'
                    if art["art_url"] else art["art_name"])
        html += (
            f"<tr>"
            f"<td>{art_link}</td>"
            f"<td>{art['count']}</td>"
            f"<td>{art['planned']} pt</td>"
            f"<td>{art['actual']} pt</td>"
            f"<td>{_delta_str(art['delta'])}</td>"
            f"<td>{art['avg_pct']}%</td>"
            f"<td>{art['status']}</td>"
            f"</tr>"
        )
    html += "</tbody></table>"

    for art in arts:
        art_link = (f'<a href="{art["art_url"]}" target="_blank">{art["art_name"]}</a>'
                    if art["art_url"] else art["art_name"])
        html += (
            f"<details><summary><strong>{art['art_name']} — Detail</strong></summary>"
            '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered" style="font-size:0.85em">'
            "<thead><tr>"
            "<th>Item</th><th>State</th><th>% Done</th>"
            "<th>Weight</th><th>Status</th><th>At Risk Reason</th>"
            "</tr></thead><tbody>"
        )
        for item in art["items"]:
            item_link  = f'<a href="{item["url"]}" target="_blank">{item["title"]}</a>'
            weight_str = f"{item['planned']}pt → {item['actual']}pt"
            html += (
                f"<tr>"
                f"<td>{item_link}</td>"
                f"<td>{item['state']}</td>"
                f"<td>{item['pct_complete']}%</td>"
                f"<td>{weight_str}</td>"
                f"<td>{item['status']}</td>"
                f"<td>{item['risk_reason']}</td>"
                f"</tr>"
            )
        html += "</tbody></table></details>"
    return html

if not value_streams:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No Capability or Direct Feature data found. Ensure items have PIID labels and are assigned to groups in the hierarchy.</em></p>"))
else:
    html = ""
    for vs in value_streams:
        vs_link = (f'<a href="{vs["vs_url"]}" target="_blank">{vs["vs_name"]}</a>'
                   if vs["vs_url"] else vs["vs_name"])
        parts = []
        if vs["total_caps"]:
            parts.append(f"{vs['total_caps']} capabilities")
        if vs["total_direct"]:
            parts.append(f"{vs['total_direct']} direct features")
        counts = " · ".join(parts)
        flags  = []
        if vs["at_risk"]:
            flags.append(f"⚠️ {vs['at_risk']} at risk")
        if vs["blocked"]:
            flags.append(f"🔒 {vs['blocked']} blocked")
        flag_str = " · ".join(flags)
        subtitle = " &nbsp;·&nbsp; ".join(filter(None, [counts, flag_str]))
        html += f"<h2>🔷 {vs_link}"
        if subtitle:
            html += f" &nbsp;<small style='font-weight:normal'>{subtitle}</small>"
        html += "</h2>"

        for pi in vs["pis"]:
            html += f"<h3>{pi['piid']}"
            if pi["date_range"]:
                html += f" <small><em>{pi['date_range']}</em></small>"
            html += "</h3>"
            html += _art_summary_table(pi["capabilities"],    "🧩 Capabilities")
            html += _art_summary_table(pi["direct_features"], "🛠️ Direct Features")

    display(HTML(html))
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Legend

- **🧩 Capability** — cross-ART/VS deliverable decomposed from a Portfolio Epic
- **🛠️ Direct Feature** — Feature parented directly to an Epic (no Capability wrapper)
- **% Done** — closed issue weight ÷ total issue weight
- **Weight** — Planned pt → Actual pt
- **✅ On Track** — % Done ≥ PI Elapsed
- **⚠️ At Risk** — % Done < PI Elapsed
- **✅ Complete** / **❌ Incomplete** — outcome for a past PI
- **🔵 Planned** — future PI or not yet started
- **🔒 Blocked** — has one or more active blocking relationships
:::
